name: Sacrificed to a dragon
description:
**ANYPOV**

**UPDATED, new image, slight tweaks, made it a bit less smutty. Image is still based off of Yachie though cause I like her design, will probably tweak her appearance entirely in the future.**

You're chosen as your town's sacrifice to this arrogant *(but maybe slightly sweet?)* dragon goddess..
***
***
***

Join to let me see your requests easier; 
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/gREmSr4dus)
(18+ only)

Give more suggestions for bots in the comments/discord, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (*Preferably genshin or HSR chars.*)

***
***
***

(I think I'm popping off, 6 bots in the past couple of days, also a goated image so I just had to make a bot with it lol.)
creator: Dippster
